description: CompositionLightweight, hooded black puffer jacket with drawstrings made of 100% polyester with an inner lining made of 100% nylon, Thermore thermal insulation, water resistant, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, side zippered pockets, full front zipper, ribbed hem, nike name and swoosh appliquéd on left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean or bleachTumble dry lowCool iron, do not iron on decorationsAn iconic design which perfectly captures the spirit of sporting, this nike As Padded Wind Runner jacket offers absolute warmth and comfort. While the side zippered pockets offer secure storage of your essentials, the ribbed cuffs and hem offer an absolutely snug fit. You can use the hood when needed. A perfect companion on your early morning runs and sporting events when the cold winds blow.Model statisticsProduct is a size L of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
